title: Mobile app connection status change reflected on the Cloud
scenario: Verify that the mobile app connection status (online/offline) is correctly reflected with green/red marks across Device Users, mobile user, Inventory, and Device profile pages on the Cloud.
steps: 1. Log into the mobile app with a valid user account.
2. Check the Cloud interface on the Device Users page and verify the user shows a green mark (online).
3. Check the mobile user page on the Cloud and verify the user shows a green mark (online).
4. Check the Inventory page on the Cloud and verify the user shows a green mark (online).
5. Check the Device profile page on the Cloud and verify the user shows a green mark (online).
6. Log out of the mobile app.
7. Check the Cloud interface on the Device Users page and verify the user shows a red mark (offline).
8. Check the mobile user page on the Cloud and verify the user shows a red mark (offline).
9. Check the Inventory page on the Cloud and verify the user shows a red mark (offline).
10. Check the Device profile page on the Cloud and verify the user shows a red mark (offline).
expected: When the user is logged into the mobile app, the status shows a green mark (online) on the Device Users page, mobile user page, Inventory page, and Device profile page. When the user logs out of the mobile app, the status shows a red mark (offline) on all those pages.
